r2_closure_binding.note: This carryforward artifact is the companion of the r2 closure's resolution.carried_forward_call block; the two must never disagree. Cross-checked by rejudge/phase2_stage_family.py's validate_stage_family().

results_row.raw_line_sha256_note: sha256 of the exact line bytes (874 bytes, UTF-8, no trailing newline included in the hash) as they appear on line 1 of the source file.

actual_charge_usd_note: Real observed cost_usd from the ledger's success event (sequence 2), not the earlier 0.00737088 reservation estimate at sequence 1; the ledger's own reserved-vs-actual reconciliation on success already replaced the estimate with the true value.
carryforward_rule: r3 execution manifests must count this call as 1 of the 1,060 planned capability-preflight logical cells (planning_cell_key above) already durably completed. r3 must NOT re-issue a provider call for this planning_cell_key, must NOT mint a new execution_call_key/attempt_id for it, and must bind this artifact (by tracked_path and canonical_sha256) as the source of its output row instead. Any r3 execution manifest or runner that reissues a call for this planning_cell_key is malformed and must fail closed.
note: Evidence/accounting record only; grants no execution authority. Companion of rejudge/phase2_preflight_r2_closure_2026-07-19.json and rejudge/phase2_stage_family_ledger_2026-07-19.json.
